title: rubus prasinus f. pseudopsis
intro: Rubus prasinus f. pseudopsis, also known as the yellow raspberry or pseudopsis dewberry, is a type of raspberry shrub native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus prasinus f. pseudopsis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
